name: Paid Research Agent
description: An autonomous agent that conducts research on any topic and provides comprehensive summaries. Payment required via x402 protocol.

skills.name: Research Topic
skills.description: Conduct comprehensive research on a given topic and provide a detailed summary
examples: Research the latest developments in quantum computing
Summarize the current state of renewable energy adoption

skills.name: Analyze Data
skills.description: Analyze provided data and extract key insights
examples: Analyze this dataset and find trends
What insights can you extract from this information?
